response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but lacks explicit, recent experience with JVM ecosystems, Spring, or IDE internals — the core focus of the role. His Java exposure is mentioned briefly and dated, with no evidence of enterprise framework or build tool integration work critical to the position.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-language engineering background with proven ability to build complex systems.
Active open-source contributor with tools and frameworks demonstrating systems thinking and developer tooling interest.
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching experience in software practices.
concerns: No recent or demonstrable experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or JVM-based enterprise frameworks.
Minimal evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or build tool integration work despite claimed tooling contributions.
Java skills are listed but not highlighted in recent roles; primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang.
